title: Ridsdalea venalis

It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in wound healing, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis. In traditional medicine, Ridsdalea venalis is often prepared as a decoction or a tincture, and is also used in the form of a topical paste or ointment to treat skin conditions and wounds.
